## DSM Capital Partners Discloses Sale of Taiwan Semiconductor Shares in 13F Filing

No actionable read; a single 13F sell from one institution is not indicative of a broader sentiment shift absent a pattern of concurrent outflows from TSM.

- DSM Capital Partners filed a 13F disclosing a sale of TSM shares.
- Routine institutional disclosure; no position size, rationale, or timing detail beyond the filing headline.
- Classifier confidence is low; no fundamental or strategic signal attached.
